parameters.content:
## 📓 Daily Note Creator

**Schedule:** 6:00 AM every day
**Creates:** `Homelab/40_Timeline_Weekly/Daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md` in MinIO
**Idempotent:** Skips creation if note already exists

### ⚙️ SETUP
- MinIO credential `MinIO — obsidian-vault` must exist in n8n
- Remotely Save must be syncing vault ↔ MinIO

### Focus Themes by Day
| Day | Theme |
|-----|-------|
| Mon | Planning & Priorities |
| Tue/Thu | Deep Work |
| Wed | Collaboration & Meetings |
| Fri | Review & Wrap-Up |
| Sat | Personal & Projects |
| Sun | Rest & Reflection |
